positive: A stylized, whimsical depiction of a celestial forest clearing at twilight. The main subject is a group of glowing, bioluminescent flora and fauna (mushrooms, fireflies, small stylized woodland creatures) gathered beneath massive, stylized, crystalline trees. The scene uses strong, contrasting silhouettes against a deep indigo and gradient teal background. Focus on intricate line work, clean vector illustration style, high contrast black and white elements mixed with vivid neon pops of cyan, magenta, and lime green. The composition should be circular and centered, designed to wrap around a garment. Mid-century modern aesthetic meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print detail. Highly detailed, print-friendly, seamless repeating pattern potential.
